info.name: PriceFeedSDK
info.description: The GraphQL queries the PriceFeed SDK issues against a compatible price endpoint (OracleForge / OracleBridge). Set {{baseUrl}} to your service, e.g. http://localhost:8080.

request.description: The exact query HttpTransport (Rust/TS/Python) issues. Maps directly into a PriceUpdate.
Batch variant used by fetch_many / getMany when the endpoint supports it.
